brief_notes: Strong translational study design with preclinical histological validation followed by clinical application. Tables are well-constructed with ANOVA results (F-statistics, df, p-values), MRI-histology correlations, and TBSS tract-level findings. The three immunohistochemistry markers (NeuN, neurofilament, MBP) provide compelling specificity evidence. The biphasic model of axonal pathology (swelling then loss) is well-supported by the disease duration correlation. Clinical sample size is small (n=10 MS, n=6 controls) but acknowledged.
